subcodes.first_line: The Fire which We have kindled by the hand of Power and sent forth unto Fárán, that the people of the All-Merciful might be set ablaze thereby. Blessed are they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نار اوقدناها بید الاقتدار و ارسلناها الی الفاران لیشتعل منها اهل الرحمن طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
